title: otopappus calarcanus
intro: Otopappus calarcanus, also known as the Philippine silverbell, is a plant species native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and treating respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal uses, with the leaves and flowers often being used in traditional remedies.
